subject: Mantine, a large manta ray-like Pokemon with wide flat wing-fins, gliding through a bright iridescent ocean or underwater environment
description: A large, broad-winged ray-like Pokemon glides gracefully through a shimmering, luminous environment. The creature has wide, flat, wing-like fins spread broadly, a rounded body, and a calm, peaceful demeanor. Its coloration is predominantly blue and white. The background is a soft wash of pale blues, pinks, purples, and light refractions consistent with underwater light filtering through water or the ocean surface — giving the scene a dreamlike, iridescent quality. The overall impression is one of peaceful gliding through open water or light-filled space.
foreground: Mantine with spread wing-fins, blue and white coloring, gliding
background: Iridescent ocean or underwater environment, soft light refractions
emotion: serene; graceful gliding posture, no aggression
